home.tag: Make island design easy and fun
home.subtitle: Top-down grid · 5 curated style templates · AI layout suggestions · 3D preview & item list

recognize.title: Recognize from Image
recognize.desc: Drop a Pinterest / red-book photo — AI returns an item list, style tags & a starter layout.

canvas.title: Grid Canvas
canvas.desc: 80×70 top-down grid with four independent layers — paint terrain, lay paths, place furniture.

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.desc: Pick a style; AI generates a layout for the whole island or a selected area. Keep what you like.

preview.title: 3D Block Preview
preview.desc: See your design in 3D, feel the spatial sense, and export a shopping list to follow.

home.deleteConfirm: Delete this island design? This cannot be undone.
home.footer: Not affiliated with Nintendo · A community tool · Made with love for Animal Crossing fans

gallery.title: Templates
gallery.subtitle: Pick a starting point
gallery.subtitleDesc: Each template is a complete design. Apply it and tweak freely in the editor.

palette.title: Items
palette.hint: Tip: Click an item then click on the canvas to place. Click again to deselect.

layers.title: Layers
layers.subtitle: Toggle visibility and lock per layer
layers.hint: Tip: The amber border marks the active layer. Terrain is the bottom layer, then path, building, décor.

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.subtitle: Pick a style and let AI draft a layout
ai.previewHint: The proposal is generated but not applied yet. Regenerate variants, accept all or part.
ai.footer: Current engine is rule-based (MVP). LLM API (GPT/Claude) integration is planned.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: {{count}} items · {{kinds}} kinds
shopping.empty:
Nothing on the canvas yet.
Pick an item from the left to start.

japanese.name: Japanese Garden
japanese.desc: Stone lanterns, bamboo groves, cherry blossoms and koi ponds — serene Eastern aesthetics.

garden.name: Country Cottage
garden.desc: Wooden fences, windmills, fruit trees and flower beds — warm rural vibes.

fairy.name: Fairy Forest
fairy.desc: Mushrooms, lanterns, log benches around a campfire — fairy tale forest charm.

cafe.name: Café Street
cafe.desc: Brick paths, street lights, vintage phone booths and outdoor café seating — romantic city corner.

modern.name: Modern Minimal
modern.desc: Geometric sculptures, iron fences, fountains and clean lights — crisp modern feel.

tpl_japanese_zen.name: Zen Japanese Garden
tpl_japanese_zen.desc: Cherry trees, stone lanterns and a koi pond compose a tranquil Japanese garden.

tpl_garden_farm.name: Cottage Farm Yard
tpl_garden_farm.desc: Windmills, fruit trees, vegetable patches and wooden fences — slow rural living.

tpl_fairy_forest.name: Fairy Forest Camp
tpl_fairy_forest.desc: Mushrooms and a campfire deep in a pine forest, a lantern path to a mysterious camp.

tpl_cafe_street.name: Parisian Café Street
tpl_cafe_street.desc: Outdoor café seating along brick paths, vintage phone booths and street lights.

tpl_modern_minimal.name: Modern Minimal Plaza
tpl_modern_minimal.desc: Fountains, sculptures and iron fences form a clean, minimal plaza.

recognize.noKeyDesc: Image recognition needs a multimodal LLM. We use BYOK (Bring Your Own Key): your key stays on this device. We recommend Gemini 2.0 Flash (Google AI Studio has a free tier; ≈ $0.0002 per image).
recognize.uploadDesc:
Top-down maps / 3D screenshots / Pinterest pictures all work.
Drop here or click to pick.
recognize.tip1: Top-down views give the best results (NookPhone capture / HID export).
recognize.tip2: 3D shots reveal style + visible items but not grid positions.
recognize.tip3: Clearer image, more visible items, better results.
recognize.tip4: Currently mapped to the 60 curated items; 2000+ NH library is the next step.
recognize.emptyDesc: Upload → recognize → get style breakdown, item list, and a one-click apply to canvas.
recognize.itemsEmpty: No specific items detected. Try another image.
recognize.unmatchedTooltip: No counterpart in the local catalog
recognize.skippedToast: {{placed}} items placed; {{skipped}} couldn't fit (overlap or no local match).

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.privacyNote: Your API key stays in this browser only. It is never sent to our servers. Every call is made directly from your browser to the model API.
settings.pricingGemini: Gemini 2.0 Flash: input ≈ $0.075/M tokens; ≈ $0.0002 per image
settings.pricingAnthropic: Claude Haiku: input $0.80/M tokens; ≈ $0.003 per image

inspirations.title: Inspirations
inspirations.subtitleDesc: Every successful recognition is auto-saved here so you can revisit, re-apply, or export anytime. Data stays in this browser only.
inspirations.emptyDesc: Drop a Pinterest or Reddit island screenshot into Recognize and it will be saved here automatically.
inspirations.clearAllConfirm: This will permanently delete all {{count}} saved references.
inspirations.deleteConfirm: Remove this reference image from your inspirations library? This cannot be undone.

importHid.subtitle: Happy Island Designer PNG decoder
importHid.subtitleDesc: Drop a PNG exported from HID to inspect its objects, terrain layers and metadata. You can also download the full JSON payload.
importHid.previewOnlyDesc: HID uses its own object vocabulary; mapping it onto our editor needs a translation table — that's queued for a later release.
importHid.uploadDesc:
Drop here or click to choose
(Must be the original HID export — screenshots / JPEG re-saves wipe the hidden data)
importHid.tip1: HID hides the island JSON inside the PNG's alpha channel.
importHid.tip2: Most chat apps re-encode images as JPEG; share the file directly.
importHid.tip3: The downloaded JSON loads in the official HID web app as-is.
importHid.emptyDesc: Upload a PNG → it decodes automatically → you'll see the island contents and a JSON download.
importHid.objectsEmpty: No objects found — likely an empty map.
importHid.errorNoPayload: No HID payload found inside the PNG. The file isn't a HID export, or it was screenshotted / re-saved as JPEG, which destroys the hidden data.
importHid.errorCorrupt: The hidden payload is corrupted or not a HID map.
importHid.errorImage: Couldn't read the image. Try another file.
